subcodes.first_line: O Thou Self-Sufficing Lord! Shower Thy blessings upon Thy servants and handmaidens, and graciously fulfill the desires of all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بی نياز بندگان و کنيزان را بنواز و آرزوی جميع را شايان و رايگان ساز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
